app.title: Competitive Analysis
app.tagline: Ask the agent to research a product — it runs an evidence-backed teardown and saves the report here.
session.empty: No research yet. Start one below.
session.deleteBody: Delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
library.title: Research library
library.empty: Artifacts produced by this conversation appear here.

chat.emptyBody: Describe the product and the agent will run the product-swipefile teardown: evidence collection, an inventory, then a decision-ready report — all saved to the research library.
chat.example3: 分析一下 Linear 的增长路径
